title: Bee Removal Upper West Side | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal in Upper West Side, Manhattan. Safe, humane extraction from $350-$550. Serving UWS brownstones & apartments. Licensed experts. Call today!
intro: The Upper West Side's tree-lined streets and historic brownstones provide beautiful living spaces, but they can also attract bees seeking nesting sites in walls, eaves, and window frames. Best Pest Control NYC offers professional bee removal services throughout the Upper West Side, from Riverside Drive to Central Park West, ensuring safe and humane extraction of bee colonies from your property.
whyUs: Our licensed technicians have extensive experience working in Upper West Side's diverse architecture, from pre-war co-ops to classic brownstones. We provide same-day service throughout the neighborhood and use eco-friendly methods that protect both your property and the local ecosystem, with pricing transparent from $350-$550 depending on colony size and location.
localContext: Upper West Side residents near landmarks like the American Museum of Natural History, Lincoln Center, and Riverside Park often encounter bee activity during warmer months, particularly in garden-level apartments and rooftop spaces. The neighborhood's abundant green spaces and flowering gardens make it especially attractive to honeybees and carpenter bees seeking new hives.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in the Upper West Side?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal services in the Upper West Side range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of the colony, accessibility, and location within your building. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before starting any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Do you remove bees from Upper West Side brownstones and pre-war buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in bee removal from all Upper West Side building types, including historic brownstones, pre-war co-ops, and modern high-rises. Our technicians are experienced in working with older architecture and take extra care to preserve historic building features while safely removing bee colonies.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a bee problem in the Upper West Side?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency bee removal services throughout the Upper West Side. Most calls are responded to within 2-4 hours, and we understand the urgency when bees pose a threat to families, especially in densely populated residential areas near schools and parks.

faqs.question: Will you relocate the bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we prioritize humane bee relocation rather than extermination, especially for honeybees. Our technicians will assess the situation and, if safe and feasible, relocate the colony to a local beekeeper or appropriate habitat. For aggressive species or situations where relocation isn't possible, we use targeted treatments that minimize environmental impact.
